sacco

Class QuickButtonFrame

  • java.lang.Object
    • sacco.QuickButtonFrame

  • public class QuickButtonFrame
extends java.lang.Object

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      QuickButtonFrame()
      Constructs a new QuickButtonFrame with only one available button space
      QuickButtonFrame(int rows, int cols)
      Constructs a new QuickButtonFrame with the given number of rows and columns

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      void addQuickButton(QuickButton q)
      Adds a new QuickButton to the frame.
      void launch()
      Causes the QuickButtonFrame to display, containing any QuickButtons that have been added.

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • QuickButtonFrame

        public QuickButtonFrame()
        Constructs a new QuickButtonFrame with only one available button space

      • QuickButtonFrame

        public QuickButtonFrame(int rows,
                int cols)
        Constructs a new QuickButtonFrame with the given number of rows and columns
        Parameters:
        rows -
        cols -

    • Method Detail

      • addQuickButton

        public void addQuickButton(QuickButton q)
        Adds a new QuickButton to the frame. You may not exceed the maximum number of QuickButtons
        Parameters:
        q - The QuickButton to add

      • launch

        public void launch()
        Causes the QuickButtonFrame to display, containing any QuickButtons that have been added.
